'''''Ghost''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] responded to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attack on the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Juvaini]]''. Despite her assistance, she was destroyed along with ''Juvaini''.

{{Ship-stub}}
